docket_entries.description: SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DZUL CACERES, FRANCISCO JAVIER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY VICTOR ORTIZ--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--- VICTOR ORTIZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
